Display.multi_display: Simultaneous LCD and CRT, 150 degree tilt

memory.slots: 1 socket for one JEDEC 144 pin EDO SO DIMM of 8, 16, 32, or 64 MB
memory.features: 16MB standard; socket accessed from bottom via screw

display_options: 12.1" DSTN SVGA color 800x600, 65,536 sim colors, 30 to 1 contrast
12.1" TFT SVGA color 800x600, 65,536 simultaneous colors, 100 to 1 contrast (Black Matrix TFT)

storage.optical: 8x CD-ROM, 5.25", multi-session, XA, ATAPI, not bootable, not removable

Battery.form: Removable, not user-accessible without lifting keyboard

ACadapter: 35 watt Universal AC Adapter, barrel connector
ports: 2 x PCMCIA Type II (or 1 Type III, Zoomed Video support in lower slot)
audio: 16-bit audio chip (Crystal Semiconductor CS4236), 20 voice MIDI FM synthesis
Internal speaker (0.5W), internal microphone, full duplex
keyboard: Full-size 85-key keyboard (all-in-one design, does not lift up)

physical.weight: 7.1 pounds (3.2 kg) with battery and CD-ROM
